name: io.github.koki-socialgist/decixa-mcp
description: Decixa MCP Server — discover and select APIs by capability for AI agents.

tools.name: search_apis
tools.description: Search for APIs by intent or capability. Returns top-ranked APIs verified to accept x402 payments.

tools.name: browse_apis
tools.description: Browse the API index with optional filters (capability, domain, billing model). Returns APIs verified to accept x402 payments.

tools.name: get_api_detail
tools.description: Get full details for a specific API including pricing, endpoints, trust signals, and verified_live flag.

tools.name: list_capabilities
tools.description: List all available capability categories and domain tags used for filtering.

tools.name: get_index
tools.description: Get the machine-readable discovery index of all verified APIs.
